description: Drone-related skills (Drone Interfacing, Combat Drone Operation, racial drone specs, drone damage amount) don't fully propagate to drone DPS in the fitting engine. Cross-check against Pyfa v2.66.2 + Theorycrafter v1.9.6-ag7 (the project audit reference). Fix the modifier resolution; verify against the saved reference fits used in earlier audit rounds.
title: Fitting: drone skill propagation to drone DPS
